creator: swhetzel@gmail.com
text:
On 7/22/07, linimon@freebsd.org <linimon@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Synopsis: security/vscan: patch to fix plist problem
>
> This port depends on the deprecated/insecure port misc/compat3x.  Is it
> still worth trying to update this port?
>

We could remove misc/compat3x from the port and rely on misc/compat4x
and the mapping of libc.so.3 to libc.so.4 in libmap{,32}.conf

Scot
-- 
DISCLAIMER:
No electrons were mamed while sending this message. Only slightly bruised.
